arts.ttl: Liverpool facing nightmare Man City suspension scenario as Arne Slot, Everton charged by FA after Merseyside derby
arts.sum: The FA confirm that Liverpool, Everton, Arne Slot and Spike Hulshoff have all been charged in the wake of Wednesday's 2-2 Merseyside derby draw.

arts.ttl: FA confirm charges for Liverpool, Everton & Arne Slot following Merseyside derby mayhem
arts.sum: The English Football Association (FA) have revealed the charges brought against Liverpool, Everton, Arne Slot and his assistant.

arts.ttl: Everton unveils commemorative shirts and merch to celebrate final season at Goodison
arts.sum: Everton has launched its new 'Echoes of an Era' merchandise collection as it prepares to say goodbye to Goodison

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Slot charged after Everton red card
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot must wait to discover the extent of his ban after he was sent off amid fractious scenes at the end of Wednesday's Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: FA issue statement as Liverpool and Everton hit with charges for Merseyside derby chaos and referee row
arts.sum: Tempers reached boiling point after a dramatic conclusion to the Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Team News: Crystal Palace vs. Everton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Everton.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Everton, Arne Slot and Sipke Hulshoff charged over post-match clash
arts.sum: The Liverpool boss and his assistant confronted the match officials while both teams are charged with failing to control their players and staff.

arts.ttl: Club eyeing big sale after Everton’s two January bids rejected – Toffees may need to dig deep
arts.sum: Everton target Merlin Röhl is seen as the next major departure for the club, hence them seeing two bids rejected in the January transfer window. That’s according to SportBILD, who add more information to the report from earlier this week about Everton’s rejected bids. arts.ttl: Everton and Liverpool are both charged by the FA following Merseyside derby chaos after referee Michael Oliver sent off four people - including Reds boss Arne Slot
arts.sum: Everton and Liverpool have both been charged by the FA following the chaotic scenes that ensued after the final whistle of the final ever Merseyside derby at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Everton, Liverpool and Slot charged after derby melee
arts.sum: Everton, Liverpool and Arne Slot are charged by the Football Association after incidents at the end of Wednesday's Merseyside derby at Goodison Park.
